title: Null user branch in profile endpoint
description: A profile endpoint returns user.display_name after adding an unauthenticated branch.

expected_findings.title: User can be None before display_name access
Missing unauthenticated profile regression test

title: SQL string interpolation in search
description: Search query is built with an f-string from request parameters.

files.base:
def search(conn, term):
    return conn.execute("SELECT * FROM docs WHERE title = ?", [term])

expected_findings.title: User input is interpolated into SQL

title: N+1 repository calls in dashboard
description: Dashboard loops over projects and fetches owner data one item at a time.

expected_findings.title: Per-project owner lookup introduces N+1 calls

title: Missing branch deletion push test
description: GitHub Actions event resolver handles all-zero push SHAs but tests only cover normal push.

expected_findings.title: Missing branch deletion event regression test

title: Token logged on failed webhook
description: Webhook failure path logs the full Authorization header for debugging.

expected_findings.title: Authorization token can be written to logs

title: Pagination cursor ignored
description: A new list endpoint accepts cursor but always starts from the first page.

files.head:
def list_items(items, cursor, limit):
    cursor = None
    page = items[:limit]
    return page

expected_findings.title: Cursor parameter is ignored

title: Regex compiled inside hot loop
description: Import parser compiles the same pattern for every line of a large file.

expected_findings.title: Regex is compiled inside a hot loop

title: Weak JWT audience validation
description: JWT verifier checks signature and expiry but drops the audience check.

files.base:
def decode_token(jwt, key, audience):
    return jwt.decode(key=key, audience=audience)
files.head:
def decode_token(jwt, key, audience):
    return jwt.decode(key=key, options={"verify_aud": False})

expected_findings.title: JWT audience validation is disabled

title: Boolean env parsing regression
description: Feature flag parser treats any non-empty string, including false, as enabled.

files.head:
def enabled(value):
    return bool(value)

expected_findings.title: String false is parsed as enabled

title: Missing malformed compare URL test
description: Target parser adds compare URL support without malformed URL coverage.

expected_findings.title: Missing malformed compare URL parser test

title: Unsafe YAML load
description: Configuration loader switches from safe_load to load without specifying a safe loader.

files.head:
def load_config(yaml, text):
    return yaml.load(text)

expected_findings.title: Unsafe YAML load can construct objects

title: Quadratic duplicate detection
description: Duplicate detection changed from a set lookup to nested loops over imported rows.

expected_findings.title: Nested duplicate scan can become quadratic

title: Denied role test gap
description: Permission check now branches by role, but tests only cover allowed roles.

expected_findings.title: Missing denied-role permission regression test

title: Large response materialized twice
description: Export endpoint builds a full list and then copies it again before streaming.

expected_findings.title: Large export result is materialized twice

title: Timezone naive date comparison
description: Billing code compares timezone-aware timestamps to datetime.utcnow output.

files.base:
def expired(now, deadline):
    return now > deadline

expected_findings.title: Naive UTC timestamp can break comparisons

title: Retry exhaustion test gap
description: HTTP client retry loop adds max attempts but tests only cover first retry success.

expected_findings.title: Missing retry exhaustion test case

title: SSRF through webhook callback URL
description: Webhook callback fetches a user-provided URL without scheme or host validation.

expected_findings.title: User provided callback URL can trigger SSRF

title: Sorting entire table before pagination
description: Repository now sorts all records in memory before slicing a requested page.

expected_findings.title: Full table is sorted before pagination

title: Invalid JSON parse fallback
description: JSON parse errors now return an empty object, causing invalid payloads to be accepted.

expected_findings.title: Invalid JSON payloads are silently accepted

title: Profile endpoint false positive control
description: A harmless refactor should not produce a finding.
